channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-09
item.description:
Our open-source research community has seen exciting progress recently, with notable updates to both the `scienceverse/metacheck` and `JamieCummins/regcheck` projects. In `metacheck`, the `data_check` branch has been improved with enhanced caching, better folder handling, and a new approach to preserving original data. Meanwhile, `regcheck` has received a slew of updates on its "staging" branch, including budget-saving changes, improved specificity for "missing" judgements, and aesthetic bug fixes. These updates demonstrate the connections between our projects, with both focusing on refining data handling and improving overall efficiency. The overlap in goals between `metacheck` and `regcheck` highlights the collaborative spirit of our community, and we celebrate the progress made by our contributors, including Jamie Cummins' significant updates to `regcheck`. As our projects continue to evolve, we look forward to seeing the impact of these changes on our research endeavors.

49 commits across 6 active repositories this week.

Dormant repos revived: statcheck

Most active:

docpluck20 commits
metacheck18 commits
regcheck6 commits
statcheck2 commits
coarse2 commits

item.title: statcheck: activity update
item.description:
MicheleNuijten/statcheck

The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch was worked on, where a merge was performed from the same branch of the `https://github.com/MicheleNuijten/statcheck` repository. The merge commit was made to integrate changes from the remote repository into the local `feature-non-apa-newer` branch. Additionally, on the `feature-non-apa-newer` branch, "admin updates" were made, as per the commit message. No other branches were modified in this set of commits. The changes were relatively minor, with no new features or modules added beyond the admin updates.

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →

item.title: regcheck: 3 commits today
item.description:
JamieCummins/regcheck

Work was done on the "staging" branch, where a "small fix" was applied, as stated by Jamie Cummins. The "staging" branch also saw "budget-saving changes", according to Jamie Cummins, which were implemented to reduce costs. Additionally, on the "staging" branch, Jamie Cummins made changes to "improve specificity on 'missing' judgements", updating the handling of such cases. The "staging" branch also received an "update default openai model", which changed the default model used, and "aesthetic bug fixes", which addressed visual issues. Furthermore, the "staging" branch saw an "improve backend handling of insufficient evidence" change, which enhanced how the backend handles cases with insufficient evidence.

3 commit(s) today:

  • 2363d45 [staging] small fix — Jamie Cummins
  • 8277b4d [staging] budget-saving changes — Jamie Cummins
  • f8a0f65 [staging] improve specificity on 'missing' judgements — Jamie Cummins

View all commits →
